title: rubus sclerophyllus
intro: Rubus sclerophyllus, also known as the prickly blackberry or woody blackberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family Rosaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus sclerophyllus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried for use in capsules and topical applications.
